title: chamomilla courrantiana
intro: Chamomilla courrantiana, also known as the pineapple chamomile or pineapple appleblossom, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of apigenin and other flavonoids, which possess anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Chamomilla courrantiana include calming and soothing effects on the nervous system, making it useful for treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its ability to ease digestive issues and promote relaxation. Chamomilla courrantiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
